scenario: Retirement age less than current age
expectedError: Planned retirement age must be greater than current age

scenario: Retirement age equal to current age
expectedError: Planned retirement age must be greater than current age

scenario: Current age at lower boundary (18) with higher retirement age
expectedError: Planned retirement age must be greater than current age

scenario: High current age with retirement age just below
expectedError: Planned retirement age must be greater than current age
